content.text:
I'll start by exploring the repository structure to get familiar with the codebase.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">find /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/omms -type f -name "*.md" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">ls -la /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/omms/</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="read">
<parameter name="path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/omms</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Let me get a better view of the directory structure:
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/omms && find . -type f | sort</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Perfect! Here's a warmup summary of the repository:

**Repository: omms**
**Location:** /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/omms
**Current Branch:** main

**Repository Structure:**
- `.git/` - Git directory
- `README.md` - Main documentation (currently modified)
- `docs/` - Documentation directory
  - `CLIENT_ZERO_RFQ.pdf` - Client RFQ document (recently renamed from RFQ.pdf)
- `tasks/` - Task tracking directory
  - `0001_TASK_REVIEW_DOCS.md` - First task for reviewing documents

**Recent Activity:**
- Most recent commit added task review documentation
- RFQ.pdf was renamed to CLIENT_ZERO_RFQ.pdf
- README.md has been improved and currently has uncommitted changes

**Current Git Status:**
- 1 modified file: README.md
- 1 renamed file: RFQ.pdf -> CLIENT_ZERO_RFQ.pdf

This appears to be a project documentation and task tracking repository. I'm ready to help you search for specific information or explore particular areas of the codebase. What would you like me to investigate?
